{{Quote|One of the spacers' laser-blasts fortunately missed its two-legged target... but struck the hapless bantha instead.|Pera|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 7">[[Star Wars (1977) 7|''Star Wars'' (1977) 7]]</ref>}}
The [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Pera]] in [[Tun Aduban]] used a '''bobtail bantha''' to pull the bantha [[Travois/Legends|travois]] bearing the corpse of a [[borg]] to [[Spacer's Hill]]. This bantha appeared different from the [[Bantha/Legends|common bantha]] in that it had much shorter fur, leaving its facial features and limbs distinctly visible. It also had a short, stubby tail. This bantha had been bobbed and shaven by its owner for unknown reasons, or might represent a distinct breed of bantha. Unfortunately, the Pera's bantha was accidentally shot in a fight that erupted when a number of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] tried to prevent the borg's burial.
